description: CompositionBlack round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, slightly distressed rubber and graphic print on the front and brand tab attached to the left hem on the frontFitRegularWash careMachine wash below 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanDry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorationsSport brand adidas have come up with this simple yet fashionable T-shirt. Great style and exemplary comfort combined, this tee is a sure wardrobe favourite - pair it with denims and sports shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
